subject: Swift Trigger 381591: Retraction of Reported UVOT Source
body:
S. T. Holland (CRESST/GSFC/USRA), N. P. M. Kuin (MSSL/UCL),
M. M. Chester (PSU), M. H. Siegel (PSU), and C. B. Markwardt
(CRESST/GSFC/UMD) report on behalf of the Swift/UVOT team:

Further analysis of the full Swift/UVOT data has shown that the  
uncatalogued
Swift/UVOT source reported in GCN Circ. 10303 is not real but an image  
artifact.
